summary: Frontend-only RoomPage UX validation completed on public preview URL. Requested participants behavior works: card shows max 2 users, CTA appears for overflow and opens modal with full list, participant identity bits are preserved, and room/chat/timer basic flows did not regress.

ui_bugs.issue: Two close (X) icons are rendered in modal header area, reducing visual cleanliness.

issues: Duplicate close affordance appears (custom close + DialogContent built-in close).

action_items: Keep a single modal close control (either custom button or DialogContent default close) for cleaner UX.
Optionally add a small frontend e2e regression test file for participants card/modal flow to preserve this behavior in future edits.
critical_code_review_comments: frontend/src/pages/RoomPage.js is ~987 lines (>700 guideline). Split participants/timer/chat sections into focused components for maintainability and safer UI iteration.
Duplicate modal close controls come from both shared DialogContent default close and RoomPage custom close button.
test_credentials: Read /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Dev preview auth bypass user is test@izlek.dev (MOCKED auth).
seed_data_creation: Created one test room (room_id: f3b14afc-cd08-4bdd-9a53-92cc5e10fc30, code: 575DA5) and joined 3 synthetic participants via public /api/rooms/join to validate >2 participants UX.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified on public URL from frontend/.env using live UI + API-assisted participant seeding. Participants card showed exactly 2 users, CTA text was '+2 kişi daha · Tümünü gör', modal listed all 4 participants with avatar initials, username, owner badge, and one study field. Timer/chat smoke checks on same room passed.
rca of the issue: Modal close icon duplication root cause: shared DialogContent component already renders a default top-right Close button in frontend/src/components/ui/dialog.jsx, while RoomPage also injects a custom close button in the participants modal header. Both render simultaneously.
